title: 「Provided that / Providing that」句型
titleZh: 「Provided that / Providing that」表達必要條件
titleEn: Using Provided that / Providing that to express a necessary condition

source.file: Sentence Strucrure 24 - 「Provided that _ Providing that」表達必要條件.pdf
omissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Main clause + provided that / providing that + condition clause

formulas.formula: Main clause + provided that / providing that + condition clause
Provided that / Providing that + condition clause, + main clause

example: I was allowed to leave work early provided that I had worked an extra shift beforehand.
exampleZh: 只要我事前多做一更，我便獲准提早下班。

examples.en: I was allowed to leave work early provided that I had worked an extra shift beforehand.
examples.zh: 只要我事前多做一更，我便獲准提早下班。
examples.highlight: provided that I had worked an extra shift beforehand

meaning.en: This structure means that something may happen, will happen or will be permitted only when a necessary condition is satisfied.
meaning.zh: 這個句型表示：只有在某個必要條件獲得滿足時，某件事才可以發生、才會發生或才會獲准進行。

benefits.en: It makes a necessary condition clear, so readers immediately know that something is not unconditional and a stated requirement must be met first.
benefits.zh: 清楚說明必要條件，讓讀者立即知道某件事並非無條件發生，而是必須先符合指定要求。

benefits.en: It is useful for permission and rules because it explains what someone may do and what requirement they must follow.
benefits.zh: 適合表達許可和規則，說明一個人可以做甚麼，以及必須遵守甚麼要求。

benefits.en: It helps you make clear offers and agreements by placing what you are willing to do and what the other person must do in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 幫助提出清楚的提議和協議，把你願意做的事情和對方必須做到的事情放在同一句內。

benefits.en: It combines two related ideas by joining what may happen with the condition that must be satisfied.
benefits.zh: 把兩個相關意思連成一句，把「可以做甚麼」和「需要符合甚麼條件」清楚連接。

benefits.en: It gives you an alternative to if, adds sentence variety and particularly emphasises that something is possible only if the condition is met.
benefits.zh: 避免反覆使用 if，增加句式變化，並特別強調「只有符合條件才可以」。

benefits.en: It is useful in formal communication such as work arrangements, applications and approvals, business agreements, school rules, refund terms and service requirements.
benefits.zh: 適合較正式的溝通，例如工作安排、申請和批准、商業協議、學校規則、退款條款及服務要求。

rules.en: Provided that and Providing that have the same meaning: only if, on condition that, or as long as. Provided that is especially common in rules, agreements and formal writing; Providing that is also natural in British English and may sound slightly more conversational.
rules.zh: Provided that 和 Providing that 意思相同，均表示 only if、on condition that、as long as、「只要」、「條件是」或「前提是」。Provided that 在規則、協議及正式書面語中尤其常見；Providing that 在英式英語中亦十分自然，有時語氣稍為口語化。

rules.en: The condition must be satisfied. Provided that / Providing that does not merely introduce an ordinary possibility; it emphasises a necessary condition.
rules.zh: 這個條件必須得到滿足。Provided that / Providing that 不只是提出一個普通可能性，而是強調某件事發生的必要條件。
examples: You can use the room if you clean it afterwards.
You can use the room provided that you clean it afterwards.

rules.en: The condition may follow the main clause. When the main clause comes first, a comma is not normally needed before provided that / providing that.
rules.zh: 條件可以放在主句後面。主句在前時，通常不需要在 provided that / providing that 前加逗號。
examples: You may leave early provided that your work is complete.

rules.en: The condition may come first. When it begins the sentence, place a comma after the condition clause.
rules.zh: 條件可以放在句首；條件放在句首時，應在條件子句後加逗號。
examples: Provided that your work is complete, you may leave early.

rules.en: A future condition normally uses the present tense rather than will after provided that / providing that.
rules.zh: 未來條件通常不用 will；當主句談及未來時，provided that / providing that 後通常使用現在式。
examples: Correct: We will have a picnic provided that the weather stays dry.
Not normally used in this lesson: We will have a picnic provided that the weather will stay dry.

rules.en: The structure may express a negative condition. Place not in the verb phrase of the condition clause.
rules.zh: 可以表達否定條件；否定詞 not 放在條件子句的動詞部分。
examples: You may use the computer provided that you do not download any games.

rules.en: Retain the complete forms provided that and providing that in this lesson, even though provided and providing may sometimes be used alone as conjunctions.
rules.zh: 本課保留完整的 that。Provided 和 providing 有時可以單獨用作連接詞，但本課統一練習 provided that 及 providing that。

rules.en: Provided that / Providing that introduces a necessary condition that has not yet been satisfied. Given that introduces a fact treated as known or established and uses it to explain a decision or result.
rules.zh: Provided that / Providing that 表示一項尚待滿足的必要條件；Given that 表示一項說話者視為已知或已成立的事實，並以該事實解釋之後的決定或結果。兩個句型一般不能互相替換。
examples: Provided that we have a large enough budget, we can choose the more advanced plan.
Given that we do not have a large enough budget, we have no choice but to choose the simpler plan.

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only teaching explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using provided that or providing that to express a necessary condition.

Both forms have the same basic meaning. The answer key provides one preferred model answer, but the other form may also be accepted when it is grammatically correct and preserves the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 provided that 或 providing that 改寫以下句子，以表達必要條件。
兩種形式的基本意思相同。參考答案會提供一個建議答案；如另一種形式文法正確並保留原意，亦可以接受。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: You may borrow my pen, but you must return it after class.
questions.promptZh: 你可以借用我的筆，但你必須在下課後歸還。
questions.answer: You may borrow my pen provided that you return it after class.
questions.answerZh: 只要你在下課後歸還，你便可以借用我的筆。
questions.highlight: You may borrow my pen provided that you return it after class.
acceptedAnswers: You may borrow my pen providing that you return it after class.

questions.answerZh: 只要父母同意，米婭便可以參加旅行。

acceptedAnswers: Mia can join the trip provided that her parents agree.
